title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (f), SECTION TWO (f), (43 QUEZON), PAGE 109; PROJECTS B-421.43, PAGE 680, B-421.52, PAGE 678, B-421.62, PAGE 682, AND B-421.64, PAGE 684, APPENDIX A; AND PRIORITY NUMBERED TWENTY-FOUR, PAGE 79, APPENDIX B, OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 958 / 58 OG No. 14, 2891 (April 2, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3282, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (f), SECTION TWO (f), (43 QUEZON), PAGE 109; PROJECTS B-421.43, PAGE 680, B-421.52, PAGE 678, B-421.62, PAGE 682, AND B-421.64, PAGE 684, APPENDIX A; AND PRIORITY NUMBERED TWENTY-FOUR, PAGE 79, APPENDIX B, OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (f), Section two (f), (43 Quezon), page 109; projects B-421-43, page 680, B-421.52, page 678, B-421.62, page 682, and B-421.64, page 684, AppenÂdix A; and priority numbered twenty-four, page 79, Appendix B, of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, are hereby amended to read as follows:

"(f) Maria Aurora Municipal Building ,Construction and/or repair

3,000.00

" B-421.43. Jumalig Barrio Road , Polillo,Construction

2,000.00

" B-421.52. Poblacion-Callejon Road , San Antonio Construction

2,000.00

" B-421.62. Poblacion-Callejon Feeder Road , San Antonio Construction

4,000.00

" B-421.64. Ilog-agos River Barrio Road , Infanta , Completion

4,000.00

"Priority 24. Panukulan Home Economics Building , Polillo, Construction

5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
